Program Filming Started for Our ‘Tırnak İçinde’ Youtube Channel

22.11.2023

‘Tırnak İçinde’ Youtube Channel will continue its broadcasting life from where it left off with interesting programs in different concepts.

Preparations for the new broadcasting period of our “Tırnak İçinde” Youtube channel, one of the important digital content projects of our university, have started.

On the channel, where programs with three different concepts will be broadcast in the new broadcast period, competent names in different fields of social sciences will meet with the audience on certain days and hours every week with their original comments. The programs, which will be prepared with the aim of raising awareness about our own agenda and our priority issues, will also bring to the agenda the works that are underappreciated despite their mission, effort and function.

The programs, whose concept designs, contents, shooting and broadcasting processes will be carried out by a professional team under the roof of Ibn Haldun University, will be broadcast on https://www.youtube.com/@tirnakicindeTV on its own day and time every week.

In the new broadcast period of the channel, the programs will be presented to the viewers around the concepts of "Social Science for Everyone", "1000 Fundamental Works" and "Not Praised Enough".

"Social Science for Everyone"

Within the concept of "Social Science for Everyone", programs will be shot in different fields of social sciences, on topics that need awareness and information, with the guest of competent names in their fields. With the concept, where only Ibn Haldun University academics and postgraduate graduates will be hosted, it is aimed to reveal the claim of our University in the field of social sciences.

"1000 Fundamental Works"

Within the concept of "1000 Basic Works"; programs will be filmed in order to convey the reading-watching suggestions of the guests who are experts in the relevant field regarding the basic works in the fields such as literature, art, philosophy, history, sociology, Islamic Sciences, cinema and to create a basic reference / bedside list in social sciences in general. With these programs, it is also aimed to create a valuable social sciences vocabulary.

"Not Praised Enough"

Within the concept of "Not Praised Enough"; programs will be shot to tell about people / events / works / places / projects that are not appreciated / appreciated enough, which should be brought to the forefront and brought to the agenda more, despite the fact that they present a role model, an exemplary personality with their life-work / very well and delicately thought out and implemented / rarely found in the world / one of the most valuable in their field, etc. The first programs on the channel are scheduled to air in December.

You can follow the channel's social media accounts to be informed about the broadcasts:

Youtube / Instagram / X / LinkedIn/ Facebook: @tirnakicindeTV
